Container.Name: crashtest
Container.Overview:
SimpleLogin is an open-source email alias platform that lets you shield your real inbox behind forwarding aliases.
[b]All-In-One Unraid Edition[/b] `simplelogin-aio` packages the web UI, background jobs, inbound email handler, Postfix, PostgreSQL, and Redis into one Unraid-first container with persistent appdata paths.
[b]Quick Install (Beginners)[/b] 1. Install this template in Unraid. 2. Set [code]URL[/code], [code]EMAIL_DOMAIN[/code], [code]SUPPORT_EMAIL[/code], and [code]FLASK_SECRET[/code]. 3. Choose an outbound relay mode if your ISP blocks outbound TCP 25. 4. Forward inbound TCP 25 from your router/firewall to the Unraid host if you want internet mail delivery. 5. Start the container, wait for first boot to finish, then add the required DNS records from the setup guide.
[b]Power Users (Advanced View)[/b] - Advanced View exposes the full official upstream self-hosting environment surface plus wrapper-specific relay and AIO controls. - Leave defaults in place for the easiest install. Only set overrides you actually need. - You can point the app at external PostgreSQL or Redis, customize alias domain behavior, enable SSO providers, tune anti-spam and analytics integrations, and provide custom asset/key files through the optional [code]/custom-assets[/code] mount.
[b]Important Notes[/b] - Current upstream packaging is [code]linux/amd64[/code] only. - This is still a real self-hosted mail stack. DNS, deliverability, router/firewall port forwarding, and sender reputation still matter. - For the simplest operation, keep the internal Postgres/Redis/Postfix defaults and only set the small required config set above.
Container.Changes:
[b]Latest release[/b] - v4.80.1-aio.1 [b]Dependency Updates[/b] - Bump dockerfile frontend digest
[b]Documentation[/b] - Clarify in-app SimpleLogin feature coverage
[b]Features[/b] - Align simplelogin-aio with sure-aio parity
[b]Fixes[/b] - Skip no-op release drafts - Make releases manual and gate heavy workflows - Harden publish and changelog range - Expose full upstream env surface
Full changelog and release notes: [url=https://github.com/JSONbored/simplelogin-aio/releases]GitHub Releases[/url]
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: email alias privacy forwarding self-hosted proton mail postfix smtp dkim
Container.Requires: **For full inbound mail delivery:** a public domain, correct DNS records, and inbound TCP 25 forwarded to your Unraid host. If outbound TCP 25 is blocked, use an SMTP relay mode instead of direct delivery.

Config.Name: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Primary persistent directory for PostgreSQL, Redis, DKIM keys, uploads, generated JWT keys, and application state.

Config.Name: PGP Keyring Directory
Config.Description: Persistent directory for your GnuPG keyring and optional server-generated PGP signing keys.

Config.Name: Custom Assets Directory
Config.Description: Optional host path mounted at /custom-assets for advanced file-based settings such as custom words lists, OpenID keys, Paddle public keys, or imported PGP material.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port used by the SimpleLogin web UI.

Config.Name: SMTP Inbound Port
Config.Description: Inbound SMTP port. Forward TCP 25 from your router or firewall to the Unraid host if you want aliases to receive internet mail.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: Public HTTPS URL for the dashboard, for example https://mail.example.com.

Config.Name: Primary Email Domain
Config.Description: Primary alias domain, for example example.com.

Config.Name: Support Email
Config.Description: From address for system mail, for example support@example.com.

Config.Name: Flask Secret
Config.Description: Long random app secret. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: SMTP Relay Mode
Config.Description: Outbound mail mode. Use a relay provider if your ISP blocks outbound TCP 25.

Config.Name: Brevo Username
Config.Description: Brevo SMTP username, usually your account email. Required when RELAY_MODE=brevo.

Config.Name: Brevo Password
Config.Description: Brevo SMTP key or password. Required when RELAY_MODE=brevo.

Config.Name: Proton Mail SMTP Token
Config.Description: Proton Mail Bridge SMTP token. Required when RELAY_MODE=protonmail.

Config.Name: Gmail Username
Config.Description: Full Gmail address used for relay auth. Required when RELAY_MODE=gmail.

Config.Name: Gmail App Password
Config.Description: 16-character Gmail app password. Required when RELAY_MODE=gmail.

Config.Name: Mailgun Username
Config.Description: Mailgun SMTP username, usually postmaster@yourdomain. Required when RELAY_MODE=mailgun.

Config.Name: Mailgun Password
Config.Description: Mailgun SMTP password. Required when RELAY_MODE=mailgun.

Config.Name: Custom Relay Host
Config.Description: Required when RELAY_MODE=custom. Example: [smtp.provider.com]:587

Config.Name: Custom Relay Username
Config.Description: SMTP username for your custom relay. Required when RELAY_MODE=custom.

Config.Name: Custom Relay Password
Config.Description: SMTP password for your custom relay. Required when RELAY_MODE=custom.

Config.Name: External PostgreSQL DB_URI
Config.Description: Leave blank for the bundled database. External format: postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname

Config.Name: External Redis URL
Config.Description: Leave blank for the bundled Redis. External format: redis://:pass@host:6379/0

Config.Name: Postfix Server Override
Config.Description: Advanced escape hatch. Leave at 127.0.0.1 to keep the bundled Postfix path.

Config.Name: Postfix Port Override
Config.Description: Advanced escape hatch. Leave at 25 for the bundled Postfix path.

Config.Name: DNS Nameservers
Config.Description: Comma-separated resolvers used for lookups, for example 1.1.1.1,1.0.0.1.

Config.Name: Custom Temp Directory
Config.Description: Optional temp directory path inside the container or a mounted path.

Config.Name: Words File Path
Config.Description: Advanced path override for the words file used for random alias generation. Use /custom-assets if you mount your own file.

Config.Name: Local File Uploads
Config.Description: Leave true for local file storage inside /appdata.

Config.Name: GnuPG Home
Config.Description: GnuPG home directory path used for PGP features.

Config.Name: Partner API Token Secret
Config.Description: Optional partner token secret. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Blank uses FLASK_SECRET.

Config.Name: Disable Registration
Config.Description: Set to 1 to block public registration after your initial setup.

Config.Name: Disable Onboarding Emails
Config.Description: Recommended for self-hosted installs.

Config.Name: Disable Alias Suffix
Config.Description: Set to 1 to disable the default random-word alias suffix requirement.

Config.Name: Enable SPF Enforcement
Config.Description: Enable SPF enforcement using the extra headers provided by Postfix.

Config.Name: Print Emails Instead of Sending
Config.Description: For testing only. When true, email bodies are logged instead of sent.

Config.Name: Enable Colored Logs
Config.Description: Optional colored log output for debugging.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: General stats and admin alert email recipient.

Config.Name: Support Name
Config.Description: Display name used alongside SUPPORT_EMAIL.

Config.Name: Postmaster Address
Config.Description: Postmaster email used by some mail-related features.

Config.Name: Max Free Plan Email Count
Config.Description: Max number of emails a non-premium user can generate.

Config.Name: Alias Rate Limit
Config.Description: Alias creation rate limit. Example: 100/day;50/hour;5/minute

Config.Name: Automatically Disable Aliases
Config.Description: Optional automatic alias disable behavior.

Config.Name: Allowed Redirect Domains
Config.Description: JSON list of allowed redirect domains. Example: ["app.example.com"]

Config.Name: Landing Page URL
Config.Description: Optional landing page URL shown by the app.

Config.Name: Status Page URL
Config.Description: Optional status page URL shown by the app.

Config.Name: hCaptcha Secret
Config.Description: hCaptcha secret key from your hCaptcha site. Set both hCaptcha fields to enable.

Config.Name: hCaptcha Site Key
Config.Description: hCaptcha site key from your hCaptcha site. Set both hCaptcha fields to enable.

Config.Name: Email Servers With Priority
Config.Description: MX records custom domains should use. Example: [(10, "mail.example.com.")]

Config.Name: Other Alias Domains
Config.Description: JSON list of extra alias domains. Example: ["example.net","example.org"]

Config.Name: Alias Domains Override
Config.Description: Full alias-domain override as a JSON list. If set, it replaces OTHER_ALIAS_DOMAINS.

Config.Name: Premium Alias Domains
Config.Description: JSON list of premium-only domains. Example: ["vip.example.com"]

Config.Name: First Alias Domain
Config.Description: Alias domain used when creating the first alias.

Config.Name: Bounce Prefix
Config.Description: VERP bounce prefix. Must end with + if used.

Config.Name: Bounce Suffix
Config.Description: VERP bounce suffix. Must start with + if used.

Config.Name: Bounce Prefix For Reply Phase
Config.Description: Reply-phase bounce prefix without a trailing +.

Config.Name: GitHub Client ID
Config.Description: GitHub OAuth app client ID.

Config.Name: GitHub Client Secret
Config.Description: GitHub OAuth app client secret.

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: Google OAuth client ID.

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: Google OAuth client secret.

Config.Name: Facebook Client ID
Config.Description: Facebook OAuth client ID.

Config.Name: Facebook Client Secret
Config.Description: Facebook OAuth client secret.

Config.Name: Proton Client ID
Config.Description: Proton OAuth client ID.

Config.Name: Proton Client Secret
Config.Description: Proton OAuth client secret.

Config.Name: Proton Base URL
Config.Description: Proton API base URL override.

Config.Name: Proton Validate Certs
Config.Description: Certificate verification for Proton integration.

Config.Name: Connect With Proton
Config.Description: Enable Proton login integration.

Config.Name: Proton Cookie Name
Config.Description: Cookie name for Proton login integration.

Config.Name: OIDC Icon
Config.Description: Font Awesome icon slug for generic OIDC login button.

Config.Name: OIDC Discovery URL
Config.Description: OIDC discovery URL, usually ending in /.well-known/openid-configuration.

Config.Name: OIDC Scopes
Config.Description: Space-separated OIDC scopes. Default works for most providers.

Config.Name: OIDC Name Field
Config.Description: OIDC user-info field used for display name.

Config.Name: OIDC Client ID
Config.Description: OIDC client ID.

Config.Name: OIDC Client Secret
Config.Description: OIDC client secret.

Config.Name: Enable SimpleLogin OIDC Provider
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable SimpleLogin as an OpenID provider.

Config.Name: OpenID Private Key Path
Config.Description: Optional OpenID private key path. Blank auto-generates when ENABLE_OIDC_SERVER=1.

Config.Name: OpenID Public Key Path
Config.Description: Optional OpenID public key path matching the private key above.

Config.Name: Apple API Secret
Config.Description: Apple sign-in API secret.

Config.Name: Mac App Apple API Secret
Config.Description: Apple sign-in secret for the native Mac app.

Config.Name: Sentry DSN
Config.Description: Sentry DSN for backend error tracking.

Config.Name: Sentry Front-End DSN
Config.Description: Optional separate Sentry DSN for front-end error tracking.

Config.Name: Plausible Host
Config.Description: Plausible Analytics host.

Config.Name: Plausible Domain
Config.Description: Plausible tracked domain.

Config.Name: Flask Profiler Path
Config.Description: Optional Flask profiler sqlite path.

Config.Name: Flask Profiler Password
Config.Description: Optional Flask profiler password.

Config.Name: Enable SpamAssassin
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable SpamAssassin integration.

Config.Name: SpamAssassin Host
Config.Description: SpamAssassin server host or IP.

Config.Name: HIBP Scan Interval Days
Config.Description: How often to check Have I Been Pwned data.

Config.Name: HIBP API Keys
Config.Description: JSON list of HIBP API keys. Example: ["key1","key2"]

Config.Name: Auto-Generate PGP Server Key
Config.Description: Set to 1 to auto-generate a PGP server key pair.

Config.Name: PGP Sender Private Key Path
Config.Description: Optional path to a private PGP key used to sign forwarding emails. Use /custom-assets or /pgp if you provide your own key.

Config.Name: DKIM Private Key Path
Config.Description: Advanced DKIM private key path override. Leave at /dkim.key for the wrapper-managed default.

Config.Name: S3 Bucket
Config.Description: Bucket name used by upstream S3-backed features.

Config.Name: AWS Access Key ID
Config.Description: AWS or S3-compatible access key ID.

Config.Name: AWS Secret Access Key
Config.Description: AWS or S3-compatible secret access key.

Config.Name: AWS Region
Config.Description: AWS region.

Config.Name: Paddle Vendor ID
Config.Description: Paddle vendor ID.

Config.Name: Paddle Monthly Product ID
Config.Description: Paddle monthly product ID.

Config.Name: Paddle Yearly Product ID
Config.Description: Paddle yearly product ID.

Config.Name: Paddle Public Key Path
Config.Description: Path to your Paddle public key file, for example /custom-assets/paddle_public.pem.

Config.Name: Paddle Auth Code
Config.Description: Paddle auth code.

Config.Name: Coinbase Webhook Secret
Config.Description: Coinbase webhook secret.

Config.Name: Coinbase Checkout ID
Config.Description: Coinbase checkout ID.

Config.Name: Coinbase API Key
Config.Description: Coinbase API key.

Config.Name: Coinbase Yearly Price
Config.Description: Coinbase yearly price value.

Config.Name: Custom Config File Path
Config.Description: Expert-only alternate dotenv file path. Usually leave blank and use the template fields instead.

Config.Name: Monitoring Email
Config.Description: Optional monitoring report email recipient.

Config.Name: Unsubscriber Address
Config.Description: Optional address that receives unsubscribe requests.

Config.Name: Legacy Unsubscriber Address
Config.Description: Legacy alias for unsubscribe routing.

Config.Name: Users With HTTP Unsubscribe
Config.Description: Comma-separated users allowed to use HTTP unsubscribe.

Config.Name: Legacy Free Plan Alias Limit
Config.Description: Legacy free-plan alias cap used for old accounts.

Config.Name: DB Connection Name
Config.Description: Optional PostgreSQL application_name override.

Config.Name: AWS Endpoint URL
Config.Description: Optional custom S3-compatible endpoint URL.

Config.Name: Paddle Monthly Product IDs
Config.Description: JSON list of extra Paddle monthly product IDs. Example: [12345,67890]

Config.Name: Paddle Yearly Product IDs
Config.Description: JSON list of extra Paddle yearly product IDs. Example: [12345,67890]

Config.Name: Paddle Coupon ID
Config.Description: Optional Paddle coupon product ID.

Config.Name: Proton Extra Header Name
Config.Description: Optional Proton integration header name override.

Config.Name: Proton Extra Header Value
Config.Description: Optional Proton integration header value.

Config.Name: Prevent Linked Proton Change
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag. Set true to prevent linked Proton account changes.

Config.Name: Sentry Trace Rate
Config.Description: Optional Sentry trace sample rate. Example: 0.001

Config.Name: Postfix Backup Servers
Config.Description: Comma-separated backup outbound SMTP servers.

Config.Name: Postfix Submission TLS
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag. Set true to use Postfix submission with TLS on port 587.

Config.Name: Postfix Timeout
Config.Description: Postfix send timeout in seconds.

Config.Name: Postfix Connect Timeout
Config.Description: Postfix connect timeout in seconds.

Config.Name: Proton MX Servers
Config.Description: Comma-separated Proton MX servers.

Config.Name: Proton Email Domains
Config.Description: Comma-separated Proton email domains.

Config.Name: Load PGP In Email Handler
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag for niche local PGP loading behavior.

Config.Name: Apple Webhook Secret Check
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to validate Apple webhook shared secret.

Config.Name: Max Spam Score
Config.Description: SpamAssassin spam score threshold for forwarded mail.

Config.Name: Max Reply Spam Score
Config.Description: SpamAssassin spam score threshold for reply-phase mail.

Config.Name: PGP Signer Address
Config.Description: Optional signer address used for outgoing encrypted email.

Config.Name: No Reply Address
Config.Description: Formatted no-reply address override.

Config.Name: Partner No Reply Address
Config.Description: Formatted partner no-reply address override.

Config.Name: HIBP API RPM
Config.Description: Have I Been Pwned requests-per-minute limit.

Config.Name: Skip HIBP For Partner Aliases
Config.Description: Optional HIBP behavior override for partner aliases.

Config.Name: Save Unsent Directory
Config.Description: Optional directory where unsent emails are stored.

Config.Name: Rspamd Signs DKIM
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag indicating DKIM signing is handled by Rspamd.

Config.Name: Twilio Auth Token
Config.Description: Optional Twilio auth token for phone-related integrations.

Config.Name: Phone Provider 1 Secret
Config.Description: Optional phone provider secret.

Config.Name: Phone Provider 2 Header
Config.Description: Optional phone provider header name.

Config.Name: Phone Provider 2 Secret
Config.Description: Optional phone provider secret.

Config.Name: Zendesk Host
Config.Description: Optional Zendesk host for support integrations.

Config.Name: Zendesk API Token
Config.Description: Optional Zendesk API token.

Config.Name: Zendesk Enabled
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to enable Zendesk integration.

Config.Name: DMARC Check Enabled
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to enable DMARC checks.

Config.Name: VERP Prefix
Config.Description: VERP prefix override.

Config.Name: VERP Email Secret
Config.Description: Custom VERP secret. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Must be at least 32 chars.

Config.Name: Transactional Bounce Prefix
Config.Description: Optional transactional bounce prefix.

Config.Name: Transactional Bounce Suffix
Config.Description: Optional transactional bounce suffix.

Config.Name: Alias Transfer Token Secret
Config.Description: Alias transfer token secret. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Disable Create Contacts For Free Users
Config.Description: Optional upstream behavior override for free-user contact creation.

Config.Name: Alias Random Suffix Length
Config.Description: Length of generated alias random suffix.

Config.Name: Event Webhook URL
Config.Description: Optional event webhook destination URL.

Config.Name: Event Webhook Skip Verify SSL
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to skip SSL verification for the event webhook.

Config.Name: Event Webhook Disabled
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to disable event webhooks.

Config.Name: Event Webhook Enabled User IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated user IDs allowed to emit event webhooks.

Config.Name: Event Listener DB URI
Config.Description: Optional dedicated DB URI for the event listener.

Config.Name: Max API Keys
Config.Description: Maximum number of API keys per user.

Config.Name: Memory Store URI
Config.Description: Optional memory store URI override.

Config.Name: Recovery Code HMAC Secret
Config.Description: Recovery-code HMAC secret. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Must be at least 16 chars.

Config.Name: Min Rspamd Score For Failed DMARC
Config.Description: Rspamd score threshold for quarantining DMARC-failed email.

Config.Name: Enable All Reverse Alias Replacement
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to replace all reverse aliases.

Config.Name: Max Reverse Alias Replacements
Config.Description: Maximum reverse aliases replaced when the related feature is enabled.

Config.Name: Disable Rate Limit
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to disable rate limiting.

Config.Name: Alias Create Rate Limit Free
Config.Description: Free-user alias create rate limits in hits,seconds:hits,seconds format.

Config.Name: Alias Create Rate Limit Paid
Config.Description: Paid-user alias create rate limits in hits,seconds:hits,seconds format.

Config.Name: Alias Restore One Rate Limit
Config.Description: Single-alias restore rate limits in hits,seconds:hits,seconds format.

Config.Name: Alias Restore All Rate Limit
Config.Description: Bulk alias restore rate limits in hits,seconds:hits,seconds format.

Config.Name: Max Bounces Per Day
Config.Description: Maximum daily bounces before automatic handling triggers.

Config.Name: Max Bounces Per Week
Config.Description: Maximum weekly bounces before automatic handling triggers.

Config.Name: Partner DNS Custom Domains
Config.Description: Expert partner mapping in key=value;key=value format. Example: a.com=x.com;b.com=y.com

Config.Name: Partner Domain Validation Prefixes
Config.Description: Expert validation prefixes in key=value;key=value format.

Config.Name: Mailbox Verification Override Code
Config.Description: Optional mailbox verification override code for controlled environments.

Config.Name: Audit Log Max Days
Config.Description: Maximum audit log retention in days.

Config.Name: Alias Trash Days
Config.Description: Days before trashed aliases are purged.

Config.Name: Allowed OAuth Schemes
Config.Description: Comma-separated allowed OAuth callback schemes.

Config.Name: Max Email Forward Recipients
Config.Description: Maximum forward recipients per email.

Config.Name: Master Encryption Key Hex
Config.Description: Hex-encoded master encryption key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: MAC Key Hex
Config.Description: Hex-encoded MAC key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Abuser HKDF Salt
Config.Description: Hex-encoded HKDF salt. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Invalid MX IPs
Config.Description: Comma-separated invalid MX IPs ignored by validation logic.

Config.Name: Use Rust PGP
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to use the Rust PGP implementation.

Config.Name: SMTP Size Limit
Config.Description: Maximum SMTP message size in bytes.

Config.Name: Partner Support URL
Config.Description: Optional partner support URL shown by the app.

Config.Name: Admin FIDO Required
Config.Description: Admin FIDO requirement. Valid values: none, any, hardware.

Config.Name: Admin Grace Period
Config.Description: Admin grace period in seconds before FIDO enforcement.

Config.Name: Drop PGP Key Attachments On Reply
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to drop PGP key attachments on reply.

Config.Name: UpCloud Username
Config.Description: Optional UpCloud username for niche upstream integrations.

Config.Name: UpCloud Password
Config.Description: Optional UpCloud password for niche upstream integrations.

Config.Name: UpCloud DB ID
Config.Description: Optional UpCloud database ID for niche upstream integrations.

Config.Name: Store Transactional Emails
Config.Description: Presence-based upstream flag to store transactional emails.
